# muvon/octofs

Installs the octofs CLI (file editing and viewing tool by Muvon)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `octofs` | Run octofs |
| `octofs --help` | Show help and available options |
| `octofs --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
octofs --version

# Show help
octofs --help
```
